description: Merges two sorted transaction id lists
Returns the merged list of transaction ids
Appends element from 'left' list to 'merged' list
Appends element from 'right' list to 'merged' list

conditions: merged and left and right and (merged[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])
description: Drops the final duplicate element when all lists end on the same value
Iterates over the 'left' and 'right' lists to merge them
